embeds.title: How to Play - Dtide Introduction
embeds.description:
An introduction to the DTide event in Morimens.

There is a great very first Alert 1 guide on Reddit by Angbak here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Morimens/comments/1r9vyv3/dtide_alert_1_guide/

#morimens #howtoplay #beginners #beginner #dtide
